compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect brainstorm enforcement hook and sentinel
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references the brainstorm enforcement hook in the hook architecture section
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm.*gate\|brainstorm.*enforcement\|pre-enterplanmode" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references the sentinel mechanism
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm-sentinel\|brainstorm.*sentinel" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references the allowlist bypass
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist\|active-skill-context" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate config key
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate" CLAUDE.md

## Implementation Details
Update CLAUDE.md hook architecture section to document:
1. The new EnterPlanMode PreToolUse hook (pre-enterplanmode.sh) that blocks plan mode without brainstorm
2. The brainstorm sentinel file ($ARTIFACTS_DIR/brainstorm-sentinel) written by /dso:brainstorm Phase 3
3. The allowlist bypass via $ARTIFACTS_DIR/active-skill-context for non-feature workflows
4. The brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate config key (default true) to disable enforcement

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting conventions.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify)
